__comment__: Converter-input template for the Arena HDF5->LeRobot converter. It is JOINT-ONLY on purpose: the converter concatenates every non-special action group into the `action` column, and it only skips the hardcoded names {left_wrist_pose,right_wrist_pose,base_height_command,navigate_command,torso_orientation_rpy_command}. If `arm_eef` appeared here it would be treated as a (missing) joint group and padded with zeros, corrupting the action column. The EEF groups (observation.eef_pose / action.eef_pose) are added afterwards by add_single_arm_eef.py, which then overwrites meta/modality.json with the canonical ../modality.json.
